payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields: token_counts (tokens consumed in the evaluation), provider_id (which provider was used), model_id (which model/version was used), estimated_price (cost estimate for the run, often derived from token_counts and per-token price), latency_p50/p90/p95 (latency percentiles to summarize response times: median, 90th, and 95th percentile). Additional fields may include currency, timestamp, and per-request identifiers as needed for traceability.
payload.decision: provide a clear description of required evaluation accounting fields for cost, latency, and usage metrics, including definitions and example structure.

entity_resolution.reason: Fields describe evaluation metrics; IDs may be cross-referenced to external catalogs as needed.

memory_cards.statement: Evaluation accounting fields capture usage and cost metrics for a model/provider run. Core fields include token counts, provider/model IDs, estimated price, and latency percentiles (p50, p90, p95).

details: Accounting fields described and structured for evaluation summaries.

repair_options: Add explicit units for token_counts (tokens) and estimated_price (currency + unit, e.g., USD).
Include timestamp and request_id for traceability.
Provide per-request breakdown of latency components if available (network, processing, queuing).
